LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHEYANNE TORRES' MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 7, 2017 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 TO GIVE MS. TORRES AN OPPORTUNITY TO FILE A DECLARATION OF HER COUNSEL WITH A PROPOSED ANSWER. NO LATER THAN JUNE 28, 2017 MS. TORRES MUST FILE AND SERVE BY EMAIL ATTACHMENT OR E-SERVE THE DECLARATION APPENDING THE PROPOSED ANSWER. IF PLAINTIFF FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE OBJECTS TO THE PROPOSED ANSWER, IT MAY FILE AND SERVE SUPPLEMENTAL OPPOSITION PAPERS NO LATER THAN JULY 3, 2017. FOR GUIDANCE OF THE PARTIES, THE COURT TENTATIVELY DECIDES THAT ALL ARGUMENTS MADE BY FARMERS IN OPPOSITION TO THE MOTION LACK MERIT EXCEPT THE ARGUMENT THAT MS. TORRES FAILED TO FILE A PROPOSED ANSWER. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR	711, CKAREN@SFTC.ORG

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2017 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-07-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Cheyanne Torres' Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Jul-07-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court vacates prior tentative ruling and adopts the new tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Cheyanne Torres' Motion To Set Aside Default is granted. Ms. Torres must file her answer by July 17, 2017. Counsel for Ms. Torres should submit a proposed order in conformity with the new tentative ruling. Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)

Notice Of Motion And Memo Of Points And Authorities In Support Of Motion To Set Aside Default
Off Calendar Jun-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT CHEYANNE TORRES' Motion To Set Aside Default is CONTINUED to July 7, 2017 at 9:30 AM in Department 302 to give Ms. Torres an opportunity to file a declaration of her counsel with a proposed answer. No later than June 28, 2017 Ms. Torres must file and serve by email attachment or e-serve the declaration appending the proposed answer. If plaintiff Farmers Insurance Exchange objects to the proposed answer, it may file and serve supplemental opposition papers no later than July 3, 2017. For guidance of the parties, the court tentatively decides that all arguments made by Farmers in opposition to the motion lack merit except the argument that Ms. Torres failed to file a proposed answer. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiff'S Request To Set Case For Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff Farmers Insurance Exchange A Corporation,
No appearance by defaulted defendant Chyanne Sherre Torres aka Chayanne Sheere Torres,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

Witness: Joel Alonza and Jill Haymer, Farmers Insurance Representative, sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $55,604.46
Pre-Judgment Interest: $11,047.77
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $517.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $67,169.23

Judgment signed in open court.
